Reinventing patient inbound again with smarter triage. Smart Conversation Topics, Smart Triage Questions and Accurx Bell are coming. Register your interest here.
We’ve recently been notified of attempts being made to scam individuals into thinking that they’re interviewing for a job post with Accurx.
If you have been contacted by someone who you don’t think is from Accurx, please let us know by reaching out to us at  jobs@accurx.com

Transform healthcare with us

Join our mission to tackle society's greatest challenge.
View open roles

Fixing communication in healthcare

Every health system around the world is struggling to meet rising demand. We have a solution — fixing communication in healthcare. This will make patients healthier, staff happier, and the system more efficient.

Open roles

Lead Frontend EngineerLead Frontend EngineerLead Frontend EngineerLead Frontend EngineerLead Frontend EngineerLead Frontend EngineerLead Frontend Engineer

What you can expect from us at every stage

Our mission is to fix healthcare communication, and we want every candidate to leave our process feeling inspired by that goal. We promise an experience that is respectful, transparent, and meaningfully challenging. You'll be informed, supported to showcase your strengths and provided with honest feedback along the way - regardless of the outcome.

How we started

Our eureka moment

In 2017 we spent six months camped out in a GP practice in Oxford, manually improving any process we could find. Over time we realised every issue we saw was underpinned by one, big, underlying problem — broken communication.

That insight became our mission. Today, we're building the communication platform that connects every part of the health system, centred around the patient.

Hard problems, worth solving

Here's a taste of the challenges you could be working on. If they were easy, they would have been solved already.

Network adoption

How do we get adoption across the whole health system, so everyone involved in a patient's care can communicate with each other?

Care model innovation

How do we disrupt models of care that predate the NHS and are no longer fit for purpose?

Data security

How do we keep patient data safe whilst ensuring everyone who needs to can access it?

AI deployment

How do we harness AI on our platform to improve healthcare access and productivity?

We're already doing it

Our platform is transforming healthcare delivery across the NHS every single day.

200,000+

Healthcare staff use our platform daily

200,000+

Messages sent every single day

98%

Of GP practices in England use Accurx

20%+

Productivity improvement since 2019

Accurx has completely transformed how we communicate with patients. What used to take hours now takes minutes.

NHS GP Practice Manager

If you've had a message from your GP, you probably already use us.

In 2025 we sent 330.8 million messages. So if you've received test results, had a medical question answered or been asked to book an appointment online, there's a very good chance it was via Accurx.

Transformation, not digitisation

We use tech to change how care is delivered, not just to digitise paper processes.

Care at home

Moving care out of the hospital to people's homes, making healthcare more accessible and comfortable.

Right first time

Getting patients to the right service the first time, reducing unnecessary appointments and delays.

Slashing wait times

Modernising how hospital specialists deliver care to dramatically reduce waiting lists.

Work with a world-class team

Obsessed with the mission. Office-first culture. Building together.

Goldilocks size

At around 250 people, we're small enough for you to make your mark here, but big enough to create wholesale change in the system — all from the security of an established company with top-tier investors.

Close to users

Everyone spends time on the frontline with users. Nothing beats seeing the opportunities first hand. It's where we get our ideas, context, and admiration for the work they do.

Diverse backgrounds, united mission

Our team combines backgrounds in everything from big tech to small startups, NHS to consulting. What brings us together is our mission to fix healthcare communication.

Watch the video of our annual summer conference - a chance to connect as a team,  and reflect on our mission to transform communication in healthcare.

What our team say

Accurx is the first place I've worked where I feel satisfied that the work I'm doing is going to help people. Healthcare is messy and complicated, so there's always a new challenge or a new project to keep you on your toes. There's lots of work to do and lots of opportunity to get involved in whatever corner of the tech stack you're interested in. It's a workplace full of smart, passionate people trying to help make the NHS work better for everybody.

Samantha, Staff Product Engineer

I joined Accurx 4 years ago after my stem cell transplant. Spending the best part of a year in and out of hospital certainly gave me a whole new perspective on the need to join up healthcare communications. Now that's something I get to do everyday speaking to our users, customers, commissioners and partners.

Helena, Head of Customer Experience

I joined Accurx about 4 years ago, drawn in by the mission and being closer to the people using our product every day. Working with healthcare professionals, hearing how our tools impact patients, and shaping product changes from that feedback has been incredibly meaningful. We’ve come a long way as a team - but the opportunity ahead is even bigger.

Iraj ,Talent Partner
Hear more from our team on why the mission is so important to them.
Watch "We are All Patients"

Our principles: how we work

These are the behaviours we hold each other to, and how we will achieve our mission.

Fix healthcare communication

Healthcare systems are struggling; our solution is communication - all of our efforts are centred here.

Raise the bar

We have built an exceptional team to solve hard challenges. We hire for expertise and new ideas, maintaining high standards, giving honest feedback, and only delivering work we're proud of.

Be a driver, not a passenger

We make things happen, focus on the right problems, and bring the energy to deliver ambitious goals.

Succeed together

We succeed only as a team. Our mission is too important for anything less, so company success always comes first.

Move with urgency

We’re on a mission, and every day lost is a missed opportunity to improve lives. We work at pace and focus on our mission, our users, and our impact.

Be relentlessly resourceful

We embrace constraints as they force us to think differently, be creative, and focus.

Embrace challenge

We value constructive conflict over harmony, having tough conversations for the best outcome.

Benefits

Breakfast & lunch in the office

Flexible working

Access to Happl, a flexible benefits provider

Meaningful share options

Electric car and cycle schemes

Advance Parental Leave Policy

28 days holiday

Enhanced pension scheme

Ready to make a difference?

Join us in transforming healthcare communication. We're looking for people who are passionate about making a real impact.
